resources.string: UMUBURO: Gushoboza amahitamo yavuzwe haruguru birashobora kuvoma bateri yawe vuba kuruta ibisanzwe
URL yihariye ntabwo yashyizweho, cyangwa irimo ubusa. Urashobora kujya muri Igenamiterere kugirango wongere url yihariye
URL%1$s yari irimo ubusa, nyamuneka reba dosiye yawe%2$s hanyuma ugerageze
Kunanirwa gutunganya neza amakuru yikirere kuva seriveri yawe, byumwihariko%1$s
Ubwoko bwaho ’%1$s’ ntabwo byemewe, reba dosiye yawe hanyuma ugerageze
Iyi porogaramu yavuguruwe ariko seriveri urimo guhuza ntabwo yavuguruye amacomeka ya Inigo kuri Weewx. Imirima ntishobora kwerekana neza kugeza igihe Weewx ivugurure
Kuvugurura intera ntabwo byemewe, kuvugurura igenamiterere hanyuma ugerageze
%1$s ubu isaba %2$s dosiye yamakuru kuva kuri %3$s, ugomba kuvugurura %4$s no kuvugurura %5$s mbere yuko iyi porogaramu ikora neza. Kanda Ok kugirango ubone ibisobanuro birambuye kuri %6$s
Nta gukuramo cyangwa porogaramu ntabwo byashyizweho
Amatangazo arakenewe kugirango akumenyeshe mugihe ubushyuhe, imvura cyangwa imvura byujuje imipaka washyizeho
Kuva wanze uruhushya rwo kumenyesha inshuro ebyiri, ugomba kubushoboza mumiterere aho, gutangiza igenamiterere?
Nyamuneka tegereza mugihe tugenzura URL watanze

plurals.name: processing_errors2
plurals.item: Hariho% %1$d amakosa yagaragaye mugihe cyo kuvugurura, reba%2$s ibiti kubirambuye
Hariho% %1$d amakosa yagaragaye mugihe cyo kuvugurura, reba%2$s ibiti kubirambuye
Hariho% %1$d ikosa ryagaragaye mugihe cyo kuvugurura, reba%2$s ibiti birambuye
Hariho% %1$d amakosa yagaragaye mugihe cyo kuvugurura, reba%2$s ibiti kubirambuye
Hariho% %1$d amakosa yagaragaye mugihe cyo kuvugurura, reba%2$s ibiti kubirambuye
Hariho% %1$d amakosa yagaragaye mugihe cyo kuvugurura, reba%2$s ibiti kubirambuye

plurals.name: processing_errors
plurals.item: Hariho% %1$d amakosa yagaragaye muri dosiye ya%2$s, reba%2$s dosiye iboneka kuri%3$s cyangwa urebe%4$s ibiti kubisobanuro birambuye
Hariho% %1$d amakosa yagaragaye muri dosiye ya%2$s, reba%2$s dosiye iboneka kuri%3$s cyangwa urebe%4$s ibiti kubisobanuro birambuye
Hariho% %1$d ikosa ryagaragaye muri dosiye ya%2$s, reba%2$s dosiye iboneka kuri%3$s cyangwa urebe%4$s ibiti kubisobanuro birambuye
Hariho% %1$d amakosa yagaragaye muri dosiye ya%2$s, reba%2$s dosiye iboneka kuri%3$s cyangwa urebe%4$s ibiti kubisobanuro birambuye
Hariho% %1$d amakosa yagaragaye muri dosiye ya%2$s, reba%2$s dosiye iboneka kuri%3$s cyangwa urebe%4$s ibiti kubisobanuro birambuye
Hariho% %1$d amakosa yagaragaye muri dosiye ya%2$s, reba%2$s dosiye iboneka kuri%3$s cyangwa urebe%4$s ibiti kubisobanuro birambuye

resources.string: Ubwoko bwa radar ’%1$s’ ntabwo byemewe, reba dosiye yawe igenamiterere hanyuma ugerageze
Radar URL ntabwo yashyizweho. Urashobora kujya muri Igenamiterere kugirango uhindure
Menyesha buri munsi iyo imvura igeze kumupaka wagenwe
Imenyesha niba imvura irenze urugero rukabije rushingiye kumvura
Imvura ya%1$s mugihe cyanyuma %2$d %3$s yakubise urwego rukabije
Imenyesha niba imvura irenze imipaka yo kuburira ukurikije igihe cyimvura
Imvura ya%1$s mugihe cyanyuma %2$d %3$s yakubise urwego ’Kuburira’
Imenyesha niba imvura irenze igipimo cyo kureba ukurikije igihe imvura igeze
Imvura ya%1$s mugihe cyanyuma %2$d %3$s yakubise urwego ’Reba’
Uzi neza ko ushaka gukuraho amakuru yose?
Imenyesha kugeza kabiri kumunsi iyo ubushyuhe bugeze kumupaka wagenwe
Shyira kuri mpimbano, ariko ntakintu cyarangiye
URL yashyizwe kumurongo cyangwa yari irimo ubusa
Ntabwo yashoboye guhuza cyangwa gukuramo kuva kuri URL yagenwe
Ntabwo yashoboye guhuza cyangwa gukuramo ibyateganijwe
Ntabwo yashoboye guhuza cyangwa gukuramo%1$s kuva%2$s
Ntabwo yashoboye guhuza cyangwa gukuramo kuva%1$s
Ntabwo yashoboye guhuza cyangwa gukuramo radar = ishusho kuri enterineti
Ntabwo yashoboye guhuza cyangwa gukuramo igenamiterere muri seriveri yawe
Ntabwo yashoboye guhuza cyangwa gukuramo amashusho ya Webcam muri seriveri yawe
Urubuga rwa interineti ntirushyirwaho cyangwa ni ubusa
Yaba yaravuguruye ariko wifi ihuza ntishoboka
